subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Dreyfus home in Paris, 1913-05-23
subcodes.first_line: Today is the anniversary of the declaration of the Bab - Peace be upon thee! Today the Bab declared this cause in Shiraz
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز چون مبعث حضرت اعلی بود لهذا جمیع شماها را تبریک میگویم امروز روزی بود
subcodes.subjects: @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @martyrdom of the Bab, @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God
